# Getting Support

- ✨ **Feature Request** — [Request a feature](https://github.com/notfoundpages/404-retro-macos-window/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)

## 🔍 Troubleshooting

### Common Issues

**Page not displaying correctly on mobile?**
- Check that you've set the viewport meta tag: `<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">`
- Test in multiple browsers and devices

**Colors not changing?**
- Ensure JavaScript is enabled
- Check browser console for any errors (F12)
- Verify all three files (HTML, CSS, JS) are in the same directory

**Grid background looks off?**
- This is normal on some displays due to scaling
- Try adjusting the `background-size` value in `style.css`

**Still having issues?**
- Search existing [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/notfoundpages/404-retro-macos-window/issues)
- Create a new issue with:
  - Browser and OS information
  - Steps to reproduce
  - Screenshots if applicable

## 🎯 For Different User Types

### I want to use this on my website
1. Copy the files to your project
2. Customize as needed
3. See [README.md](README.md) for customization guide
4. Deploy and enjoy!

### I found a bug
1. Check [existing issues](https://github.com/notfoundpages/404-retro-macos-window/issues)
2. [Create a bug report](https://github.com/notfoundpages/404-retro-macos-window/issues/new?template=bug_report.md)
3. Include browser, OS, and reproduction steps

### I have a feature idea
1. Check [existing issues](https://github.com/notfoundpages/404-retro-macos-window/issues?q=is%3Aissue+label%3Aenhancement)
2. [Submit a feature request](https://github.com/notfoundpages/404-retro-macos-window/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)
3. Explain your use case and why it would be helpful

### I want to contribute
1. Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines
2. Check [open issues](https://github.com/notfoundpages/404-retro-macos-window/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen) for tasks
3. Fork the repo and create a pull request
